title: On His Book.
content:
The bound, almost, now of my book I see,
    But yet no end of these therein, or me:
    Here we begin new life, while thousands quite
    Are lost, and theirs, in everlasting night.
meaning:
"On His Book." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
